seo.title: About Us | Hakka Hydro Tirta Logistics
seo.description: A trusted logistics company with extensive network and integrated solutions across Indonesia.

about_us.title: Our Origin Story
about_us.paragraph: Founded in 2020 in Jakarta, PT Hakka Hydro Tirta began with a commitment to delivering more structured and reliable logistics services. In a short time, the company grew from a startup into a trusted logistics partner for a wide range of national and international corporations. With an operational network spanning key cities including Jakarta, Surabaya, Semarang, Makassar, and Batam, we bridge the complexity of logistics needs with efficient and scalable solutions.

vision_mission.vision: To become a leading logistics company in Indonesia with an integrated network and excellent service standards.
mission: To deliver integrated logistics solutions that are efficient, measurable, and reliable.
To expand and strengthen our operational network to serve logistics needs across Indonesia.
To optimize processes through technology and integrated systems.
To build long-term partnerships with clients based on trust and transparency.
To maintain service excellence through precise and high-standard execution.

items.title: Sea Freight
items.desc: Ocean shipping solutions for large-scale needs with optimal route planning.

items.title: Air Freight
items.desc: Fast shipping solutions for urgent and high-value cargo.
items.benefit: Shorter lead time and higher security.

items.title: Export & Import
items.desc: Comprehensive handling of export and import activities, including documentation.
items.benefit: Faster processes with minimized administrative errors.

items.title: Inbound & Outbound Logistics
items.desc: Structured management of incoming and outgoing goods flow.
items.benefit: More accurate inventory and distribution control.

items.title: Interinsular Shipping
items.desc: Inter-island distribution with an extensive network.

items.title: Trucking
items.desc: Land transportation with a well-coordinated fleet.
items.benefit: Flexible delivery from local to nationwide scale.

items.title: Warehouse
items.desc: Storage solutions with well-organized management systems.
items.benefit: Improved stock security and distribution efficiency.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We operate with full transparency and accountability in every process.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: Our commitment is to ensure every shipment is delivered as planned.

items.title: Efficiency
items.desc: We continuously optimize time and operational costs for our clients.

items.title: Partnership
